title: Jump-host mRemoteNG tabs wrong resolution after RDP reconnect
author: falcon4fun
body_snippet:
## Case
- RDP (via mstsc) connection to mRemoteNG active workstation (jump-host) breaks RDP tab resolution

## To reproduce
- Connect to jump-host machine via RDP via mstsc (where mRemoteNG should be launched)
- Open mRemoteNG on jump-host
- Connect to any RDP from your profile via mRemoteNG
- Disconnect from jump-host
- Connect to jump-host again via RDP
- Got wrong resolution inside RDP tab

## Mitigation fix
- RDP tab > Reconnect
- Or try to drag whole mRemoteNG window and maxize again

## Ve...

comments.author: falcon4fun
comments.snippet:
Possibly fixed by changing "Resolution" from "Fit to panel" to "SmartSize" and enabling inheritance to all items.
Somehow "Fit to panel" + "Automatic resize" goes wrong.

Will check how new setting works.

-----------

Nope. When connecting from smaller resolution, still not resizing normally :( SmartSize fixes only same resolution problem

notes:
AI triage (claude): RDP window resolution fails to resize correctly after reconnect when using 'Fit to panel' + 'Automatic resize', a reproducible UI bug affecting jump-host workflows.
Approach: Investigate resize event handling on RDP reconnect; ensure panel dimensions are correctly passed to the RDP ActiveX control after reconnect, particularly when initial connection was established at a smaller resolution.
